completed_tasks.name: Schema migration — TitleStyleProps x/y/borderRadius, remove subtitle
TitleOverlay rendering — pixel positioning, config borderRadius, subtitle removed
TitleEditor UI — x/y inputs, borderRadius slider, subtitle controls removed
Renderer sync + UAT + post-UAT fixes (stale fields BUG-1, GET/PUT divergence BUG-2)

decisions.decision: BUG-2 FIXED: resolveConfigPath() now uses ACTIVE_PIPELINE_CONFIG_PATH as fallback for GET
decisions.rationale: GET was reading services/remotion-studio/pipeline-config.json (local fallback) while PUT wrote to pipeline/pipeline-config.json. Changes were lost on reload. Previous HANDOFF noted this as 'pre-existing, not a Phase 20 bug' — UAT proved it was user-impacting and fixed it.

decisions.decision: BUG-1 FIXED: handleStartEdit now does explicit TitleStyleProps field pick
decisions.rationale: Spread of { ...title.style } re-saved deprecated fields (subtitleFontSize, subtitleColor, topOffset) on each edit. Previous HANDOFF noted this as 'expected behavior'. UAT showed it pollutes the config on round-trip.

decisions.decision: Local pipeline-config.json files cleaned of pre-Phase-20 stale fields
decisions.rationale: Both services/remotion-studio/pipeline-config.json and pipeline/pipeline-config.json had subtitleFontSize, topOffset, subtitleColor, subtitleFontFamily. Removed. Next phase starts from clean config.

next_action: Phase 20 fully complete with post-UAT fixes. Plan Phase 21 (PNG overlays): /gsd-plan-phase 21
context_notes: Two full UAT passes done with playwright. 5/5 tests passed both times. Three bugs found and fixed. Studio server on port 3123 still running. Milestone v1.3 at 95% (18/19 phases). Phase 21 is the final planned phase of v1.3.
